---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability or upgrade for OpenCone
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is (e.g. "I cannot index documents from web URLs directly").

## Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain how this fits within our MVVM-S structure.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Technical Feasibility & Constraints
If applicable, outline how this feature interacts with Apple platform sandbox boundaries or remote API rate limits.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, designs, or mockups about the feature request here.
